commands.cmd: read-only T060 privacy, atomicity, authorization, export and evidence audit

summary: Lifecycle semantics pass, but export must redact cross-profile command identifiers and enforce its row bound before materialization.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit, so the PM performed the same read-only gate as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Outgoing command history exposes target profile/revision identifiers.
Export row cap is checked only after rows are loaded.
